title: N-PAMP Signature Registry
description: Schema for the JSON representation of registries/signatures.csv: an array of row objects, one per registered signature algorithm. code_point is a 16-bit value (4 hex digits). profiles is either the literal 'All' or a comma-separated list drawn from {Standard, High, Sovereign}. Wrong-format code_point, missing column, empty usage/reference, and out-of-set profile tokens are caught here; DUPLICATE code_point values are caught by the companion validate-registries.py.

code_point.description: 16-bit signature code point, hex-prefixed, exactly 4 hex digits (e.g. 0x0807).

name.description: Signature algorithm name; MUST be non-empty.

usage.description: Where the algorithm is used (e.g. Identity, capability tokens); MUST be non-empty.

profiles.description: Profiles that permit this algorithm: the literal 'All', or a comma-separated list of {Standard, High, Sovereign}.

reference.description: Normative reference (e.g. RFC 8032, FIPS 204); MUST be non-empty.
